race.comment: SCHEHERAZADE (3) returned in fine fashion with a strong Gold Coast win and winning rider Turner retains the mount. Has two wins and a placing from three attempts at this distance range and should prove very hard to toss. CRYPTOLINI (1) put back-to-back wins together to start the career before being tipped out for further time to furnish. Tuned up for this with two recent trials and can continue the rich vein of form. OUT OF TURN (7) is one from one over this course and distance and gets some weight relief with the 1.5kg claim. Top-three credentials. SUPERHERO (4) will find this easier than recent efforts in town and is one for the exotics players. SHERAQUAY (12) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be underestimated.
